query: Could you help develop a week-long travel itinerary suitable for a group of 6 people, departing from Baton Rouge and planning to visit 3 different cities in Texas? The travel dates are set from March 17th to March 23rd, 2022. Our travel budget has been adjusted to $14,600. Bearing in mind that we have children under ten years old, our accommodations need to allow young children and we prefer to occupy entire rooms. We also prefer not to self-drive during this trip.

plan.transportation: taxi, from Baton Rouge to Texarkana, duration: 4 hours 46 mins, distance: 519 km, cost: 519

plan.attraction: Museum of Regional History;Spring Lake Park;Texarkana Museums System;Four States Auto Museum;ArtSparK;Discovery Place Interactive Museum;Texarkana Wall Murals #FABKMURAL;Texas State Line;Lindsey Railroad Museum in Downtown Texarkana;Welcome to Texas Sign;Welcome to Arkansas Sign;Texas State Line Monument;Welcome to Texas Sign;Welcome to Arkansas Sign;Texas State Line Monument
